aeat-request-rejected: AEAT did not accept the request.
certificate-delete-confirm: Delete the certificate and its password?
certificate-empty: The uploaded certificate cannot be read or is empty.
certificate-save-error: The certificate could not be saved. Check that the file is valid and that the password is correct.
certificate-save-unchanged: The certificate data has not been modified.
certificate-type-help: Choose the type of certificate you are going to use to connect with AEAT.
certificate-error-convert-server: Cannot convert certificate on this server.
certificate-error-invalid-pem-content: The certificate does not contain certificate and private key.
certificate-error-invalid-private-key: The certificate and private key are not valid.
certificate-error-missing-private-key: The .p12/.pfx does not contain a certificate and private key.
certificate-error-open-p12: The certificate could not be opened. Check that the file is a valid .p12/.pfx and that the password is correct.
certificate-error-openssl-convert: OpenSSL could not convert the certificate.
certificate-error-openssl-empty-pem: OpenSSL did not generate any PEM certificate.
certificate-error-openssl-exec: Could not execute OpenSSL from PHP.
certificate-error-replace-pem: The previous PEM certificate could not be replaced.
certificate-error-save-original: The original certificate could not be saved.
certificate-error-save-passphrase: The certificate password could not be saved.
certificate-error-save-pem: The PEM certificate could not be saved.
certificate-error-storage-dir: The secure folder for the certificate could not be created.
certificate-error-temp-cert-file: The temporary certificate file could not be created.
certificate-error-temp-files: Temporary files could not be created.
configured-certificate-missing: The configured certificate cannot be found.
configured-passphrase-missing: The configured certificate password cannot be found.
error-aeat-response: AEAT did not accept the connection. Check that the certificate is valid for this service and that the selected certificate type is correct.
error-certificate: The configured certificate could not be used.
error-certificate-passphrase: The certificate password needs to be configured.
error-certificate-revoked: The certificate appears to be revoked.
error-certificate-unauthorized: AEAT has not authorized the connection with this certificate.
error-endpoint: Could not connect to AEAT. Check the server HTTPS outbound connection and try again.
error-php-extension: A necessary PHP extension needs to be activated on the server.
error-soap: AEAT responded with a validation error.
error-soap-format: AEAT could not interpret the request sent.
error-unknown: Validation could not be completed. Check the certificate, the selected type and the server connection.
info-desc-1: ValidaNIF checks NIF/CIF of clients and suppliers with the official identification data quality service of the AEAT (VNifV2).
load-customer-error: The client could not be loaded to validate ValidaNIF.
load-supplier-error: Failed to load provider to validate ValidaNIF.
missing-customer-nif: The client does not have NIF/CIF reported.
missing-required: %requirement% is missing to be activated or configured.
missing-supplier-nif: The provider does not have NIF/CIF reported.
name: Name/company name
no-permission: You do not have permissions to modify these settings.
requirement-myfiles-message: Required to save the certificate locally.
requirement-openssl-message: Required to read the certificate and connect securely.
requirement-soap-message: Required to call the validation service.
requirements-warning: There are mandatory requirements pending on the server.
server-requirements-error: The server does not meet the requirements to connect to AEAT.
soap-client-init-error: Error initializing SOAP client with WSDL "%wsdl%": %error%
technical-error-with-reference: %message% Check the error log of FacturaScripts with the reference: %reference%
test-missing-data: Enter a NIF/CIF to try ValidaNIF.
wsdl-missing: The plugin's local WSDL cannot be found.
certificate-error-no-client-auth: The certificate does not declare client authentication usage. AEAT will verify it when testing the connection.
certificate-error-no-signing-capability: The certificate does not declare digital signing capability.
certificate-error-not-binary-p12: The file does not appear to be a valid binary .p12/.pfx certificate.
certificate-error-not-valid-yet: The certificate is not valid yet: %date%.
certificate-error-parse: The certificate information could not be parsed.
certificate-error-revoked: The certificate is revoked according to the issuer CRL.
certificate-upload-warning: The certificate has been saved, but there are warnings to review.
certificate-warning-not-qualified: No eIDAS/FNMT qualified certificate policies were found.
certificate-warning-revocation-unknown: Revocation could not be checked by CRL. AEAT will perform its own check during the connection.
certificate-expired-alert: The certificate expired on %date%. Upload an updated certificate to validate against AEAT.
certificate-not-valid-yet-alert: The certificate is not valid yet. It will be valid from %date%.
certificate-expiring-soon-alert: The certificate expires in %days% days (%date%). It should be renewed soon.
certificate-warning-expiring-soon: The certificate expires in %days% days (%date%). It should be renewed soon.
certificate-refresh-warning: Certificate information was updated, but there are warnings to review.
certificate-error-no-current-certificate: No configured certificate was found to review.
